title: Why Reading Makes You Smarter
subtitle: 阅读如何让你变得更聪明

paragraphs.en: Reading is one of the most powerful habits you can develop. Studies show that people who read regularly have better memory, stronger analytical skills, and a wider vocabulary. Whether you read fiction or non-fiction, your brain benefits from the exercise.
paragraphs.zh: 阅读是你能培养的最强大的习惯之一。研究表明，经常阅读的人拥有更好的记忆力、更强的分析能力和更广泛的词汇量。无论你读的是小说还是非小说，你的大脑都能从这项锻炼中受益。

paragraphs.en: When you read, your brain creates new neural pathways. These pathways help you think more clearly and make better decisions. Reading also reduces stress — just six minutes of reading can lower your stress levels by up to 68 percent.
paragraphs.zh: 当你阅读时，你的大脑会创建新的神经通路。这些通路帮助你更清晰地思考，做出更好的决策。阅读还能减轻压力——仅仅六分钟的阅读就能将你的压力水平降低高达68%。

paragraphs.en: The key is consistency. Even reading for just 15 minutes a day can make a significant difference over time. So pick up a book, open an article, and start building your reading habit today. Your future self will thank you.
paragraphs.zh: 关键在于坚持。即使每天只阅读15分钟，随着时间的推移也会产生显著的变化。所以拿起一本书，打开一篇文章，今天就开始培养你的阅读习惯吧。未来的你会感谢现在的自己。
